utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 main items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items explicitly. Each item is fully specified with details and associated costs: 1) health_coverage includes both physical and mental health with cost breakdowns (€120 + €70) and total health cost (€190/month); 2) property_coverage includes detailed coverage descriptions and cost (€80/month); 3) travel_coverage includes detailed travel coverage information and cost (€65/month); 4) additional_services lists specific services and mentions cost inclusion; 5) total_budget provides monthly, annual costs, and savings breakdown. Therefore, all 5/5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan selected by the AI assistant includes 'PrimeCare Premium Plan6' for physical health, mental health, property, and travel coverage. The ground-truth ratings list 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' as an available option for physical health and mental health, and 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' and 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' as the corresponding property and travel components under the PrimeCare/Prime family of premium plans. Therefore, each of these choices can be mapped to their corresponding ratings from the ground-truth data. Specifically: PrimeCare Premium Plan (physical health) has a rating of 6; PrimeCare Premium Plan (mental health) has a rating of 4; PrimeHome Premium Coverage (property) has a rating of 6; and PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel) has a rating of 6.
